heading: Sanctions on Russian and other foreign financial institutions
label: 8924 Sanctions on Russian and other foreign financial institutions
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section, see subsection (g) of this section.

children.heading: Facilitation of certain defense- and energy-related transactions
children.label: a Facilitation of certain defense- and energy-related transactions
children.text: The President shall impose, unless the President determines that it is not in the national interest of the United States to do so, the sanction described in subsection (c) with respect to a foreign financial institution that the President determines knowingly engages, on or after , in significant transactions involving activities described in subparagraph (A)(ii) or (B) of or paragraph (1) or (3) of for persons with respect to which sanctions are imposed under .August 2, 2017section 8923(a)(2) of this titlesection 8923(b) of this titlesection 8923 of this title

children.heading: Facilitation of financial transactions on behalf of specially designated nationals
children.label: b Facilitation of financial transactions on behalf of specially designated nationals

children.text: Executive Order No. 13660 (79 Fed. Reg. 13,493), 13661 (79 Fed. Reg. 15,535), or 13662 (79 Fed. Reg. 16,169); or
any other Executive order addressing the crisis in Ukraine.

children.heading: Sanction described
children.label: c Sanction described
children.text: The sanction described in this subsection is, with respect to a foreign financial institution, a prohibition on the opening, and a prohibition or the imposition of strict conditions on the maintaining, in the United States of a correspondent account or a payable-through account by the foreign financial institution.
determines that the waiver is in the national security interest of the United States; and
submits to the appropriate congressional committees a report on the determination and the reasons for the determination.

children.heading: Notification to Congress on imposition of sanctions
children.label: e Notification to Congress on imposition of sanctions
children.text: The President shall notify the appropriate congressional committees in writing not later than 15 days after imposing sanctions with respect to a foreign financial institution under subsection (a) or (b).

children.heading: Implementation
children.label: 1 Implementation
children.text: The President may exercise all authorities provided under sections 1702 and 1704 of title 50 to carry out the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Penalties
children.label: 2 Penalties
children.text: The penalties provided for in subsections (b) and (c) of shall apply to a person that violates, attempts to violate, or conspires to violate, or causes a violation of, subsection (a) or (b) of this section, or an order or regulation prescribed under either such subsection, to the same extent that such penalties apply to a person that commits an unlawful act described in .section 1705 of title 50section 1705(a) of title 50

children.heading: Termination
children.label: g Termination
children.text: This section, and sanctions imposed under this section, shall terminate on the date on which the President submits to the appropriate congressional committees the certification described in .section 8923(i) of this title
